      34             : // if you change Encode(...) / Decode(...), don't forget to update ComputeNumBytesNeeded(...)
      35             : 
      36       25233 : bool BitStuffer2::EncodeSimple(Byte** ppByte, const vector<unsigned int>& dataVec, int lerc2Version) const
      37             : {
      38       25233 :   if (!ppByte || dataVec.empty())
      39           0 :     return false;
      40             : 
      41       25233 :   unsigned int maxElem = *max_element(dataVec.begin(), dataVec.end());
      42       25233 :   int numBits = 0;
      43       83721 :   while ((numBits < 32) && (maxElem >> numBits))
      44       33255 :     numBits++;
      45             : 
      46       25233 :   if (numBits >= 32)
      47           0 :     return false;
      48             : 
      49       25233 :   Byte numBitsByte = (Byte)numBits;
      50       25233 :   unsigned int numElements = (unsigned int)dataVec.size();
      51       25233 :   unsigned int numUInts = (numElements * numBits + 31) / 32;
      52             : 
      53             :   // use the upper 2 bits to encode the type used for numElements: Byte, ushort, or uint
      54       25233 :   int n = NumBytesUInt(numElements);
      55       25233 :   int bits67 = (n == 4) ? 0 : 3 - n;
      56       25233 :   numBitsByte |= bits67 << 6;
      57             : 
      58             :   // bit5 = 0 means simple mode
      59             : 
      60       25233 :   **ppByte = numBitsByte;
      61       25233 :   (*ppByte)++;
      62             : 
      63       25233 :   if (!EncodeUInt(ppByte, numElements, n))
      64           0 :     return false;
      65             : 
      66       25233 :   if (numUInts > 0)    // numBits can be 0, then we only write the header
      67             :   {
      68       25233 :     if (lerc2Version >= 3)
      69         972 :       BitStuff(ppByte, dataVec, numBits);
      70             :     else
      71       24261 :       BitStuff_Before_Lerc2v3(ppByte, dataVec, numBits);
      72             :   }
      73             : 
      74       25233 :   return true;
      75             : }

      79      220224 : bool BitStuffer2::EncodeLut(Byte** ppByte, const vector<pair<unsigned int, unsigned int> >& sortedDataVec, int lerc2Version) const

      82           0 :     return false;
      83             : 
      84      220224 :   if (sortedDataVec[0].first != 0)    // corresponds to min
      85           0 :     return false;
      86             : 
      87             :   // collect the different values for the lut

      89      220224 :   unsigned int indexLut = 0;
      90             : 
      91      220224 :   m_tmpLutVec.resize(0);    // omit the 0 throughout that corresponds to min

      95             :   {

      98             : 
      99    14418156 :     if (sortedDataVec[i].first != prev)
     100             :     {
     101      314291 :       m_tmpLutVec.push_back(sortedDataVec[i].first);
     102      314291 :       indexLut++;
     103             :     }
     104             :   }
     105      220224 :   m_tmpIndexVec[sortedDataVec[numElem - 1].second] = indexLut;    // don't forget the last one
     106             : 
     107             :   // write first 2 data elements same as simple, but bit5 set to 1
     108      220224 :   unsigned int maxElem = m_tmpLutVec.back();
     109      220224 :   int numBits = 0;

     112             : 
     113      220224 :   if (numBits >= 32)
     114           0 :     return false;
     115             : 
     116      220224 :   Byte numBitsByte = (Byte)numBits;

     121      220224 :   numBitsByte |= bits67 << 6;
     122             : 
     123      220224 :   numBitsByte |= (1 << 5);    // bit 5 = 1 means lut mode
     124             : 
     125      220224 :   **ppByte = numBitsByte;
     126      220224 :   (*ppByte)++;
     127             : 
     128      220224 :   if (!EncodeUInt(ppByte, numElem, n))    // numElements = numIndexes to lut
     129           0 :     return false;
     130             : 
     131      220224 :   unsigned int nLut = (unsigned int)m_tmpLutVec.size();

     134             : 
     135      220224 :   **ppByte = (Byte)nLut + 1;    // size of lut, incl the 0
     136      220224 :   (*ppByte)++;

     139         423 :     BitStuff(ppByte, m_tmpLutVec, numBits);    // lut

     151             :

     173       83582 :   int numBits = numBitsByte;
     174             : 
     175       83582 :   unsigned int numElements = 0;

     266             : // -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ;
     267             : 
     268      706810 : unsigned int BitStuffer2::ComputeNumBytesNeededLut(const vector<pair<unsigned int, unsigned int> >& sortedDataVec, bool& doLut)
     269             : {
     270      706810 :   unsigned int maxElem = sortedDataVec.back().first;
     271      706810 :   unsigned int numElem = (unsigned int)sortedDataVec.size();
     272             : 
     273      706810 :   int numBits = 0;
     274     4280825 :   while ((numBits < 32) && (maxElem >> numBits))
     275     2867205 :     numBits++;
     276      706810 :   unsigned int numBytes = 1 + NumBytesUInt(numElem) + ((numElem * numBits + 7) >> 3);
     277             : 
     278             :   // go through and count how often the value changes
     279      706810 :   int nLut = 0;
     280    70849101 :   for (unsigned int i = 1; i < numElem; i++)
     281    70142291 :     if (sortedDataVec[i].first != sortedDataVec[i - 1].first)
     282     1110340 :       nLut++;
     283             : 
     284      706810 :   int nBitsLut = 0;
     285     2349483 :   while (nLut >> nBitsLut)
     286      935863 :     nBitsLut++;
     287             : 
     288      706810 :   unsigned int numBitsTotalLut = nLut * numBits;    // num bits w/o the 0
     289      706810 :   unsigned int numBytesLut = 1 + NumBytesUInt(numElem) + 1 + ((numBitsTotalLut + 7) >> 3) + ((numElem * nBitsLut + 7) >> 3);
     290             : 
     291      706810 :   doLut = numBytesLut < numBytes;
     292      706810 :   return min(numBytesLut, numBytes);
     293             : }

     296             : // -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ;
     297             : 
     298      463863 : void BitStuffer2::BitStuff_Before_Lerc2v3(Byte** ppByte, const vector<unsigned int>& dataVec, int numBits)
     299             : {
     300      463863 :   unsigned int numElements = (unsigned int)dataVec.size();
     301      463863 :   unsigned int numUInts = (numElements * numBits + 31) / 32;
     302      463863 :   unsigned int numBytes = numUInts * sizeof(unsigned int);
     303      463863 :   unsigned int* arr = (unsigned int*)(*ppByte);
     304             : 
     305      463863 :   memset(arr, 0, numBytes);
     306             : 
     307             :   // do the stuffing
     308      463863 :   const unsigned int* srcPtr = &dataVec[0];
     309      463863 :   unsigned int* dstPtr = arr;
     310      463863 :   int bitPos = 0;
     311             : 
     312    17362497 :   for (unsigned int i = 0; i < numElements; i++)
     313             :   {
     314    16898634 :     if (32 - bitPos >= numBits)
     315             :     {
     316             :       unsigned int dstValue;
     317    16896103 :       memcpy(&dstValue, dstPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     318    16896103 :       dstValue |= (*srcPtr++) << (32 - bitPos - numBits);
     319    16896103 :       memcpy(dstPtr, &dstValue, sizeof(unsigned int));
     320    16896103 :       bitPos += numBits;
     321    16896103 :       if (bitPos == 32)    // shift >= 32 is undefined
     322             :       {
     323      641620 :         bitPos = 0;
     324      641620 :         dstPtr++;
     325             :       }
     326             :     }
     327             :     else
     328             :     {
     329             :       unsigned int dstValue;
     330        2531 :       int n = numBits - (32 - bitPos);
     331        2531 :       memcpy(&dstValue, dstPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     332        2531 :       dstValue |= (*srcPtr) >> n;
     333        2531 :       memcpy(dstPtr, &dstValue, sizeof(unsigned int));
     334        2531 :       dstPtr++;
     335        2531 :       memcpy(&dstValue, dstPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     336        2531 :       dstValue |= (*srcPtr++) << (32 - n);
     337        2531 :       memcpy(dstPtr, &dstValue, sizeof(unsigned int));
     338        2531 :       bitPos = n;
     339             :     }
     340             :   }
     341             : 
     342             :   // save the 0-3 bytes not used in the last UInt
     343      463863 :   unsigned int numBytesNotNeeded = NumTailBytesNotNeeded(numElements, numBits);
     344      463863 :   unsigned int n = numBytesNotNeeded;
     345     1060324 :   for (; n; --n)
     346             :   {
     347             :     unsigned int dstValue;
     348      596461 :     memcpy(&dstValue, dstPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     349      596461 :     dstValue >>= 8;
     350      596461 :     memcpy(dstPtr, &dstValue, sizeof(unsigned int));
     351             :   }
     352             : 
     353      463863 :   *ppByte += numBytes - numBytesNotNeeded;
     354      463863 : }

     358      156165 : bool BitStuffer2::BitUnStuff_Before_Lerc2v3(const Byte** ppByte, size_t& nBytesRemaining,

     360             : {
     361             :   try
     362             :   {
     363      156165 :     dataVec.resize(numElements, 0);    // init with 0
     364             :   }
     365             :   catch( const std::bad_alloc& )
     366             :   {
     367             :     return false;
     368             :   }
     369             : 
     370      156165 :   unsigned int numUInts = (numElements * numBits + 31) / 32;
     371      156165 :   unsigned int numBytes = numUInts * sizeof(unsigned int);
     372      156165 :   unsigned int* arr = (unsigned int*)(*ppByte);
     373             : 
     374      156165 :   if (nBytesRemaining < numBytes)
     375           0 :     return false;
     376             : 
     377      156165 :   unsigned int* srcPtr = arr;
     378      156165 :   srcPtr += numUInts;
     379             : 
     380             :   // needed to save the 0-3 bytes not used in the last UInt
     381      156165 :   srcPtr--;
     382      156165 :   unsigned int lastUInt = *srcPtr;
     383      156165 :   unsigned int numBytesNotNeeded = NumTailBytesNotNeeded(numElements, numBits);
     384             : 
     385      356366 :   for (unsigned int n = numBytesNotNeeded; n; n--)
     386             :   {
     387             :     unsigned int val;
     388      200201 :     memcpy(&val, srcPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     389      200201 :     val <<= 8;
     390      200201 :     memcpy(srcPtr, &val, sizeof(unsigned int));
     391             :   }
     392             : 
     393             :   // do the un-stuffing
     394      156165 :   srcPtr = arr;
     395      156165 :   unsigned int* dstPtr = &dataVec[0];
     396      156165 :   int bitPos = 0;
     397             : 
     398     5854126 :   for (unsigned int i = 0; i < numElements; i++)
     399             :   {
     400     5697961 :     if (32 - bitPos >= numBits)
     401             :     {
     402             :       unsigned int val;
     403     5696553 :       memcpy(&val, srcPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     404     5696553 :       unsigned int n = val << bitPos;
     405     5696553 :       *dstPtr++ = n >> (32 - numBits);
     406     5696553 :       bitPos += numBits;
     407             : 
     408     5696553 :       if (bitPos == 32)    // shift >= 32 is undefined
     409             :       {
     410      216548 :         bitPos = 0;

     412             :       }
     413             :     }
     414             :     else
     415             :     {

     417        1408 :       memcpy(&val, srcPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     418        1408 :       srcPtr++;

     420        1408 :       *dstPtr = n >> (32 - numBits);
     421        1408 :       bitPos -= (32 - numBits);
     422        1408 :       memcpy(&val, srcPtr, sizeof(unsigned int));
     423        1408 :       *dstPtr++ |= val >> (32 - bitPos);
     424             :     }
     425             :   }

     432      156165 :   return true;

     435             : // -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ;
     436             : 
     437             : // starting with version Lerc2v3: integer >> into local uint buffer, plus final memcpy
     438             : 
     439        1818 : void BitStuffer2::BitStuff(Byte** ppByte, const vector<unsigned int>& dataVec, int numBits) const
     440             : {
     441        1818 :   unsigned int numElements = (unsigned int)dataVec.size();
     442        1818 :   unsigned int numUInts = (numElements * numBits + 31) / 32;
     443        1818 :   unsigned int numBytes = numUInts * sizeof(unsigned int);
     444             : 
     445        1818 :   m_tmpBitStuffVec.resize(numUInts);
     446        1818 :   unsigned int* dstPtr = &m_tmpBitStuffVec[0];
     447             : 
     448        1818 :   memset(dstPtr, 0, numBytes);
     449             : 
     450             :   // do the stuffing
     451        1818 :   const unsigned int* srcPtr = &dataVec[0];
     452        1818 :   int bitPos = 0;
     453        1818 :   assert(numBits <= 32); // to avoid coverity warning about large shift a bit later, when doing (*srcPtr++) >> (32 - bitPos)
     454             : 
     455       92671 :   for (unsigned int i = 0; i < numElements; i++)
     456             :   {
     457       90853 :     if (32 - bitPos >= numBits)
     458             :     {
     459       83170 :       *dstPtr |= (*srcPtr++) << bitPos;
     460       83170 :       bitPos += numBits;
     461       83170 :       if (bitPos == 32)    // shift >= 32 is undefined
     462             :       {
     463        5450 :         dstPtr++;
     464        5450 :         bitPos = 0;
     465             :       }
     466             :     }
     467             :     else
     468             :     {
     469        7683 :       *dstPtr++ |= (*srcPtr) << bitPos;
     470        7683 :       *dstPtr |= (*srcPtr++) >> (32 - bitPos);
     471        7683 :       bitPos += numBits - 32;
     472             :     }
     473             :   }
     474             : 
     475             :   // copy the bytes to the outgoing byte stream
     476        1818 :   int numBytesUsed = numBytes - NumTailBytesNotNeeded(numElements, numBits);
     477        1818 :   memcpy(*ppByte, &m_tmpBitStuffVec[0], numBytesUsed);
     478             : 
     479        1818 :   *ppByte += numBytesUsed;
     480        1818 : }
     481             : 
     482             : // -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ;
     483             : 
     484        1819 : bool BitStuffer2::BitUnStuff(const Byte** ppByte, size_t& nBytesRemaining, vector<unsigned int>& dataVec,
     485             :   unsigned int numElements, int numBits) const
     486             : {
     487        1819 :   if (numElements == 0)
     488           0 :     return false;
     489             : 
     490             :   try
     491             :   {
     492        1819 :     dataVec.resize(numElements);
     493             :   }
     494             :   catch( const std::bad_alloc& )
     495             :   {
     496             :     return false;
     497             :   }
     498             : 
     499        1819 :   unsigned int numUInts = (numElements * numBits + 31) / 32;
     500        1819 :   unsigned int numBytes = numUInts * sizeof(unsigned int);
     501             : 
     502             :   try
     503             :   {
     504        1819 :     m_tmpBitStuffVec.resize(numUInts);
     505             :   }
     506             :   catch( const std::bad_alloc& )
     507             :   {
     508             :     return false;
     509             :   }
     510             : 
     511        1819 :   m_tmpBitStuffVec[numUInts - 1] = 0;    // set last uint to 0
     512             : 
     513             :   // copy the bytes from the incoming byte stream
     514        1819 :   int numBytesUsed = numBytes - NumTailBytesNotNeeded(numElements, numBits);
     515             : 
     516        1819 :   if (nBytesRemaining < (size_t)numBytesUsed || !memcpy(&m_tmpBitStuffVec[0], *ppByte, numBytesUsed))
     517           0 :     return false;
     518             : 
     519             :   // do the un-stuffing
     520        1819 :   unsigned int* srcPtr = &m_tmpBitStuffVec[0];
     521        1819 :   unsigned int* dstPtr = &dataVec[0];
     522        1819 :   int bitPos = 0;
     523        1819 :   int nb = 32 - numBits;
     524             : 
     525       92854 :   for (unsigned int i = 0; i < numElements; i++)
     526             :   {
     527       91035 :     if (nb - bitPos >= 0)
     528             :     {
     529       83352 :       *dstPtr++ = ((*srcPtr) << (nb - bitPos)) >> nb;
     530       83352 :       bitPos += numBits;
     531       83352 :       if (bitPos == 32)    // shift >= 32 is undefined
     532             :       {
     533        5472 :         srcPtr++;
     534        5472 :         bitPos = 0;
     535             :       }
     536             :     }
     537             :     else
     538             :     {
     539        7683 :       *dstPtr = (*srcPtr++) >> bitPos;
     540        7683 :       *dstPtr++ |= ((*srcPtr) << (64 - numBits - bitPos)) >> nb;
     541        7683 :       bitPos -= nb;
     542             :     }
     543             :   }
     544             : 
     545        1819 :   *ppByte += numBytesUsed;
     546        1819 :   nBytesRemaining -= numBytesUsed;
     547        1819 :   return true;
     548             : }
     549             : 
     550             : // -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ;
     551             :
